Everything You Need to Govern Your Architecture

From ingestion to visualization to action, CodeGraft provides the complete toolkit for structural integrity.

GraphRAG Intelligence

Our semantic knowledge graph understands the relationships between your code, documentation, and infrastructure. Ask questions in natural language and get accurate, context-aware answers.

3D Architecture Visualization

WebGL-powered interactive maps of your entire software ecosystem. See data flows, dependencies, and drift in real-time with cinematic quality.

Universal Ingestion

Connect everything: Git repositories, Jira, Confluence, Terraform, Kubernetes, and more. Our plugin marketplace grows with your needs.

Active Governance

Policy-as-code with automated enforcement. Action triggers block risky deployments, create tickets, and notify stakeholders automatically.

Persona-Tailored Insights

Custom views for developers, architects, security engineers, and executives. Each role sees what matters most to them.

Architectural Time Machine

Scrub through your architecture's history. Understand exactly when drift occurred and what caused it.

How It Works

Three steps to structural integrity

1

1. Ingest Everything

Connect your Git repos, cloud infrastructure, documentation, and project management tools. CodeGraft automatically builds a comprehensive knowledge graph.

2

2. Analyze & Visualize

Our AI identifies architectural patterns, drift, and risks. Explore your system through interactive 3D visualizations and natural language queries.

3

3. Govern & Act

Define policies, set up automated actions, and maintain structural integrity. Get alerts before problems become crises.
